title: Prove no exterior scalar tail for A_curv / e_curv / J_curv residue
description: Dangerous form: phi_curv = C_curv/r. Required condition: curvature objects remain diagnostic/branch-filter or prove C_curv = 0. The sector must not leave a nonzero ordinary exterior 1/r scalar tail unless a future source-routing theorem explicitly routes it through the A-sector without double counting.
